{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304113009FC0455E28F05162CA2"}"},"total":13},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619624387898639129","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不错，设定挺好，作者民俗知识也很扎实，值得看看，希望越写越好[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774085359,"group_id":"7613303046264589336","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人性最为浅薄的一点 就是一错抵百好","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1rtIviIpwr7OguwKsrSG4rOU+5HmukMsMW6Y663IUTB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/090827e5879e459b9dc862d78f9c3382~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788712&x-signature=c71nHfg50Ts8NsjoGzTAjd2HbaY%3D","user_id":"2615056894534408","user_name":"化你眸中霜雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2615056894534408","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7613303046264589336","book_info":{"abstract":"【全球恐慌！一款名为《空坛》的文字游戏突兀降临！】
【游戏中的每一个选项，都将百分百投射现实！选错一步，当场暴毙！】
在这个所有人被厉鬼追杀、在规则中瑟瑟发抖的绝望时代。
江逝看着手机屏幕上那必死的“红白撞煞”开局，嘴角却疯狂上扬。
“必死局？不，这是我的素材库！”
当其他玩家还在为怎么在厉鬼手下活过一晚而哭爹喊娘时，江逝已经开始了他的骚操作：
【红白撞煞】： 别人转身就跑被撕碎，他反手涂泥装死，顺走厉鬼的买路钱！
【五通邪神】： 别人被吃干抹净，他一招“借花献佛”，逼着邪神吃下自己的肉，强行卡出无限生机BUG！
【黄泉客栈】： 别人打工抵债，他反手买下阴阳戏班，让厉鬼给他唱曲儿！
【午夜公车】： 别人给红衣女鬼让座，他指着对方鼻子骂：“死人坐什么座？给我站着！”
各国官方： “疯了吧！我们还在研究怎么活下去，他已经开始在阴间收保护费了？！”
深渊资本： “悬赏十个亿！求江逝别再卡BUG了，副本都要被他玩崩了！”
诡异厉鬼： “家人呐，谁懂啊？我只是想吓他，他反手就把我卖给了隔壁村的寡妇鬼！”
江逝： “规则？规则就是用来踩的。鬼怪？那不过是我的‘打工仔’罢了”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e2bb88fd7ae121159783636ee20c20a8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"濯予鹿","author_id":"","book_id":"7613303046264589336","book_name":"全球诡异：玩呢？文字游戏能杀人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2550人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":863,"name":"戏精","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=863&name=戏精&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1455,"name":"风水秘术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455&name=风水秘术&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7613303724002853400","read_count":"2550","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"128821"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"53","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,克苏鲁,网游,副本,规则怪谈,戏精,惊悚游戏,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.
